title: Subtitles for the Japanese Blu ray and DVD sets

wikitext: []: Subtitles for the Japanese Blu-ray and DVD sets             Quote Post by Stuart » Fri Jul 09, 2021 5:43 am Hello all, long time no speak, With Final on the way, I finally splashed out on the 2015 DVD (Broadcast) and Blu Ray (HD remaster, 2019 re-release) box sets from Japan. Going to be ripping them with MKV to watch on Mac. Does anyone have timed English subtitles for both box sets please? Preferably inn such a format that I don't need to manually cut the episode files (since the video files are 4-episodes in length each). Thanks.

Article: Subtitles for the Japanese Blu ray and DVD sets
[]: Subtitles for the Japanese Blu-ray and DVD sets             Quote Post by Stuart » Fri Jul 09, 2021 5:43 am Hello all, long time no speak, With Final on the way, I finally splashed out on the 2015 DVD (Broadcast) and Blu Ray (HD remaster, 2019 re-release) box sets from Japan. Going to be ripping them with MKV to watch on Mac. Does anyone have timed English subtitles for both box sets please? Preferably inn such a format that I don't need to manually cut the episode files (since the video files are 4-episodes in length each). Thanks.
